selection_rule: 1) garrido_cf_s2 > garrido_cf_s3 > garrido_cf_s1; 2) static_s2 > static_s3 > static_s1; 3) S2-S3 >= 1%
rationale: Original thresholds (0.78/0.78) were above the env operating range, causing gate=0 always. Lowered to match actual fill_rate/recovery levels under increased risk with priming.
